chart.title: Top 10 HTTP Browsers
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow httpUserAgent!="" httpUserAgent!="0" | bin _time span=5m | rex field=httpUserAgent "((?<browser_ff>Firefox\S+)|(?<browser_ie>MSIE [\d\.]+)|(?<browser_opera>Opera)|(?<browser_chrome>Chrome)|(?<browser_PNA>PNAMAIN.EXE)|(?<browser_safari>Safari)|(?<browser_java>Java\S+)|(?<browser_nagios>nagios\S+)|(?<browser_nessus>[Nn][Ee][Ss][Ss][Uu][Ss])|(?<browser_apache>Apache\S+))" | eval browser_none=if(httpUserAgent =="-","None","") | fillnull value="" browser_ff browser_ie browser_chrome browser_safari browser_opera browser_java browser_nagios browser_nessus browser_apache browser_PNA | eval browser = browser_ff.browser_ie.browser_chrome.browser_safari.browser_opera.browser_java.browser_nagios.browser_nessus.browser_apache.browser_PNA | replace "" with "Other/Unknown" in browser | top 10 browser

table.title: Top 10 Request URL
table.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow httpRequestUrl!="" httpRequestUrl!="0" httpRequestUrl!="*jpg" httpRequestUrl!="*png" httpRequestUrl!="*.css" httpRequestUrl!="*gif" httpRequestUrl!="*.js" | top limit=10 httpRequestUrlPath | eval percent=round(percent,2)

table.label: Number of Transactions and Flows per Observation ID
table.searchName: Transaction and Flow per Observation ID

chart.title: Avgerage Transaction Time
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | eval transactionTime=abs(flowEndMicroSeconds-flowStartMicroSeconds) | timechart avg(transactionTime) AS AvgTransactionTime by sourceIPv4Address

chart.title: Top 10 Dst IP
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | top limit=10 destinationIPv4Address | fields - percent

chart.title: Top 10 Dst Port
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | top limit=10 tcpDestinationPort | fields - percent

chart.title: Top 10 Src IP
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | top limit=10 sourceIPv4Address | fields - percent

chart.title: Top 10 Src Port
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler_appflow | top limit=10 tcpSourcePort | fields - percent
